groups.target_text: AIA Holdings Limited and its Affiliates (collectively, "AIA" or "The Group") is the largest pan-Asian Independently listed life insurance group covering 18 markets in Asia Pacific, including Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Mainland China, South Korea, Philippines, Australia, Indonesia, Taiwan, China, Special trip to Vietnam, New Zealand and Macau Administrative Region, Brunei Darussalam, Cambodia and Myanmar There are wholly-owned branches and subsidiaries, 99% interest in Sri Lanka subsidiary and a 49% interest in the Indian joint venture.

role_evidence.source_text_sample: 友邦保險控股有限公司及其 附屬公司（統稱「友邦保險」或 「本集團」）是最大的泛亞地區 獨立上市人壽保險集團，覆蓋 亞太區內18個市場，包括在香港 特別行政區、泰國、新加坡、 馬來西亞、中國內地、南韓、 菲律賓、澳洲、印尼、中國台灣、 越南、新西蘭、澳門特別行 政區、汶萊、柬埔寨和緬甸擁 有全資的分公司及附屬公司、 斯里蘭卡附屬公司的99%權益 及印度合資公司

groups.target_text: AIA's business achievements today can be Dating back to 1919 a century ago in The birthplace of Shanghai. According to life insurance premium Computing, the Group operates in Asia Pacific (Japan (except) leading the industry and operating in most markets The field firmly occupies a leadership position. As of 2019 As of December 31, the group's total asset value was $284 billion.

role_evidence.source_text_sample: 友邦保險今日的業務成就可 追溯至1919年一個世紀前於 上海的發源地。按壽險保費 計算，集團在亞太地區（日本 除外）領先同業，並於大部分市 場穩佔領導地位。截至2019年 12月31日，集團總資產值為 2,840億美元。

groups.target_text: AIA offers a range of products and Services covering life insurance, accident and medical Insurance and savings plans to suit individuals Customers' long-term savings and protection Needed. In addition, the Group is also an enterprise Client provides employee benefits, credit insurance and retirement security services. The group through A large number of exclusive agents throughout the Asia-Pacific region, A network of partners and employees for more than 36 million individual policy holders and more than 16 million group insurance plans Provide services to participating members.

role_evidence.source_text_sample: 友邦保險提供一系列的產品及 服務，涵蓋壽險、意外及醫療 保險和儲蓄計劃，以滿足個人 客戶在長期儲蓄及保障方面的 需要。此外，本集團亦為企業 客戶提供僱員福利、信貸保險 和退休保障服務。集團透過 遍佈亞太區的龐大專屬代理、 夥伴及員工網絡，為超過 3,600萬份個人保單的持有人 及逾1,600萬名團體保險計劃 的參與成員提供服務。
